# Events & Classes

## Summer Party

![Loading Events](https://atlantabg.org/wp-content/plugins/the-events-calendar/src/resources/images/tribe-loading.gif)

[Back to Events & Classes](https://atlantabg.org/calendar/category/atlanta)

- This event has passed.

## June 21, 2025 @ 6:00 pm \- 10:00 pm

# Summer Party

- [« Refugee Recipe Celebration](https://atlantabg.org/calendar/refugee-recipe-celebration/)
- [Garden Playtime »](https://atlantabg.org/calendar/garden-playtime-3/2025-06-24/)

## Details

Date:  June 21, 2025  Time:

6:00 pm - 10:00 pm

Event Categories:[Adults Programming](https://atlantabg.org/calendar/category/adults-programming/), [Atlanta](https://atlantabg.org/calendar/category/atlanta/), [Atlanta Event](https://atlantabg.org/calendar/category/atlanta-event/), [Atlanta Exhibition](https://atlantabg.org/calendar/category/atlanta-exhibition/), [Atlanta Food](https://atlantabg.org/calendar/category/atlanta-food/), [Kids Programming](https://atlantabg.org/calendar/category/kids-programming/)

## Venue

[Atlanta Botanical Garden](https://atlantabg.org/venue/atlanta-botanical-garden/)1345 Piedmont Ave NE

Atlanta,GA30309

Celebrate the summer solstice and the radiant light within us all at **Summer Party**, an unforgettable evening of glowing lanterns, live music and midsummer magic in the Garden.

Wander into the heart of Storza Woods, where light dances in the trees, puppet lanterns parade by night and cocktails shimmer in the shade.

**Saturday, June 21, 2025**

Premium Admission begins at 6 p.m.

General Admission begins at 6:30 p.m.

Bars close at 9:30 p.m. \| Event ends at 10 p.m.

**Advance purchase recommended. Tickets required for all guests and members.** Available online and at the door while supplies last.

**Parking:** $10 per vehicle. (SAGE cards not accepted).

**Zoom and Bloom**: **Rideshare users, walkers and bikers receive a drink ticket good for one mocktail**. Participants will also be entered to win a pair of tickets to a future Garden event.

_\*_ _Cash bars are available throughout the Garden. The Garden and its parking facility are card-only._

* * *

### **Buy Tickets + Picnic Boxes**

_Pricing is per person. Tickets are required for all guests and members._

#### **Premium Admission**

Premium tickets offer **exclusive amenities and personalized service:**

Savor an **exclusive sensory tour of the Edible Garden**, guided by a Garden horticulturist and [ASW Distillery](https://www.aswdistillery.com/). Premium ticket holders will explore the botanicals behind the forthcoming **ASW x Atlanta Botanical Garden gin collaboration** during an intimate distillation demonstration, engaging the senses from Garden to glass.

**Premium ticket holders also receive:**

• Early entry with express check-in

• One complimentary cocktail or mocktail

• A delicious complimentary cooling treat from [YOM](https://www.yomicecream.com/) specialty custard pops

Premium Adult members: $95

Premium Children members: $30

Premium Adult non-members: $100

Premium Children non-members: $35

[PREMIUM MEMBER TICKETS](https://purchase.atlantabg.org/auth/540/members?ref=https%3A%2F%2Fpurchase.atlantabg.org%2Forders%2F540%2Ftickets%3FeventId%3D63ffe14cd5087f539129b4c7%26date%3D2025-06-21T00:00:00)

[PREMIUM NON-MEMBER TICKETS](https://purchase.atlantabg.org/orders/540/tickets?eventId=63ffe14cd5087f539129b4c7&date=2025-06-21T00:00:00)

* * *

#### **General Admission:**

Adult members: $60

Children members: $20

Adult non-members: $65

Children non-members: $25

[MEMBER TICKETS](https://purchase.atlantabg.org/auth/540/members?ref=https%3A%2F%2Fpurchase.atlantabg.org%2Forders%2F540%2Ftickets%3FeventId%3D667468a6f9e72737174d4b51%26date%3D2025-06-21T00:00:00)

[NON-MEMBER TICKETS](https://purchase.atlantabg.org/orders/540/tickets?eventId=667468a6f9e72737174d4b51&date=2025-06-21T00:00:00)

* * *

#### **Pre-order Summertime Chef’s Picnic Box for Two • $45**

The popular grab-and-go box returns! Pre-orders are open for the curated selections from [Dulce & Sabrosa](https://www.sabrosaatl.com/) that highlight fresh, seasonal ingredients in the Summertime Chef’s Picnic Box. Limited onsite selection for purchase while supplies last.

Selections include: Pimento cheese and Benedictine tea sandwiches, chicken salad and arugula croissant, everything bagel–seasoned mini dogs, spiced pecans, edamame hummus with crudité, charcuterie skewers with fennel jam, chocolate-dipped pretzels, key lime pie, Oreo cheesecake squares, coconut cream pie, Funfetti macarons, lemon scone, strawberry cheesecake cookies.

**Pre-order your box with your tickets using the link above by June 13.**

* * *

### **About the Event**

**Light up the Night** At 8:30 p.m., large puppet lanterns from [Chantelle Rytter and the Krewe of the Grateful Gluttons](https://www.weirdgonepro.com/) emerge from the shadows of Atlanta’s old growth trees to lead a parade through Storza Woods. Join a glowing river of light with your own intricately designed and created paper lanterns through the woods. Surprises await! Lookout for **summertime characters** from [The Off Center Project](https://www.theoffcenteredproject.com/) for added whimsy.

**Rhythm is Gonna Get You** Let the music move you through every corner of the celebration!

• [Orquesta MaCuba](https://www.facebook.com/omacuba): Latin grooves in the Glade Garden

• [Michelle Winters:](https://www.michellewintersofficial.com/) Electric violin on the Canopy Walk

• [Phat Katz Brass Band:](https://klfproentertainment.com/services/phat-katz-brass-band-atlanta-georgia/) Leads the lantern parade

• [Amp’d Entertainment:](https://ampdentertainment.net/) DJ+Dancing on the Great Lawn

**Creative Fun and Festive Flair**

• Paper lantern decorating

• Whimsical face painting by [Pixie and Luna](https://pixieandluna.com/)

• Magical photo op

**Alice’s Wonderland and Enchanted Trees by Poetic Kinetics** The Garden’s blockbuster summer exhibitions are lighted beautifully in the cool of the evening. Visit [_Alice’s Wonderland_](https://atlantabg.org/plan-your-visit/atlanta-garden-calendar/imaginary-worlds/) in its final season and explore the world premiere of [_Enchanted Trees by Poetic Kinetics_](https://atlantabg.org/plan-your-visit/atlanta-garden-calendar/enchanted-trees-by-poetic-kinetics/).

**Summer Fare** Kick off the warmest season with favorite summer sweets and savories for purchase.

• Fruity Italian ice from [Kona Ice](https://www.kona-ice.com/)

• Handcrafted gelato from [Cremalosa](https://www.cremalosa.com/)

• [Dulce & Sabrosa](https://www.sabrosaatl.com/) taco bar and hot dogs

• Entrée and dessert selections from [Vanilla Crepes](https://usa.vanillacrepes.com/)

• The Garden Snack Bar will offers its usual quick-service food and beverage options.

[Longleaf](https://atlantabg.org/map-location/longleaf-restaurant/), the Garden’s full-service restaurant, and the Quick Café will be open 6 p.m. until the last seating at 8:30 p.m, walk-ins only.

* * *

### **Know Before You Go**

Chairs, pets, tobacco/vape products/smoking of all kinds, outside food/drinks are not permitted in the Garden. Food and beverages offered for purchase while supplies last. Tickets are non-refundable. No rain checks. Only guests 21 and older may purchase alcohol, ID required. Bars close at 9:30 p.m.
